description: Retrospective merge-trajectory ledger (ADR-088). Re-scores each merge commit via detached git worktree (pre vs. post) and writes append-only JSONL plus aggregate Markdown report. MVP scope: ledger + report only, no automatic scoring weight adjustment.

tests.skipped_reason: worktree integration tests require live git repo fixture; covered manually via smoke-run

isolation_contract.cleanup: contextlib.suppress(CalledProcessError) around 'git worktree remove --force' + shutil.rmtree(ignore_errors=True) in outer finally

scope_guard.phase_3_gate: Weight adaptation requires drift-version-stamping per entry + corpus balance check (>=100 trajectories, author-split variance <0.3)
